title: Zombie Survivalist
description: Fight hordes of zombies waves and protect yourself and the villager from the coming apocalypse, raid dungeons and explore lost city's in realistic biomes. CO-OP friendly.
body:
## Core-Features:
- Better enemy AI - modded enemy AI so the mobs are way more intelligent
- Dangerous Zombies - Zombies can break blocks to hunt you down
- Mob Sunscreen - Mobs don't burn in the sunlight anymore
- Elite Mobs - There is a chance that elite mobs spawns near you with great loot
- Zombie Waves - Anytime a wave of Zombies can spawn, making your life hell
- Realistic Biomes - explore biomes that are more true to life, offering a more immersive environment.
- 4 Seasons - experience changing biome temperatures with each season.
- Body Temperature - keep track of your temperature and stay warm during the winter months.
- Visual Enhancements - enjoy improved water, screen, and particle effects.
- Audio Enhancements - experience ambient sounds in biomes, reverb, and echoes in large spaces.
- Build - create amazing structures with a wide variety of new building blocks.
- Structures - discover numerous structures spread throughout the world.
##
In the **early stages** of the apocalypse, the ***luxury of easily chopping down trees with bare hands is a thing of the past***. This modpack **introduces** a ***new layer of challenge*** by requiring players to **craft primitive tools** to gather ***essential resources***.

With **water sources** ***contaminated***, **players must constantly monitor their hydration** levels to **avoid dehydration**. Every drop of ***water*** becomes **precious**!

Encounter **dynamic events** that **test** your **survival skills** and **decision-making abilities**. From **sudden zombie hordes** to **Boss Mobs** and **environmental hazards**.
##
![the night is VERY dark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nkBdEliY/images/729a259902206ae24d91f6f3857cf89ad0542310.png)
Snow biomes or deserts have environmental hazards
![Snow and Desert biomes need equipment to survive](https://i.imgur.com/c3WSfvb.png)
##
#
**核心功能**：
更好的敌人 AI - 经过修改的敌人 AI，使怪物更加智能
危险的僵尸 - 僵尸可以破坏方块来追捕你
怪物防晒霜 - 怪物不再在阳光下燃烧
精英怪物 - 精英怪物有可能在你附近生成，并拥有大量战利品
僵尸浪潮 - 随时可能生成一波僵尸，让你的生活变成地狱
逼真的生物群系 - 探索更真实的生物群系，提供更身临其境的环境。
4 个季节 - 体验每个季节生物群系温度的变化。
体温 - 跟踪你的体温并在冬季保持温暖。
视觉增强 - 享受改进的水、屏幕和粒子效果。
音频增强 - 体验生物群系中的环境声音、大空间中的混响和回声。
建造 - 使用各种新积木创建令人惊叹的结构。
结构 - 发现遍布世界各地的众多结构。

在末日的早期阶段，徒手砍树的奢侈已经成为过去。这个模组包引入了一层新的挑战，要求玩家制作原始工具来收集必要的资源。

由于水源受到污染，玩家必须不断监测自己的水分含量以避免脱水。每一滴水都变得珍贵！

遇到动态事件，考验你的生存技能和决策能力。从突然出现的僵尸大军到 Boss Mobs 和环境危害。
